title: 25 Ice Cube Bags | Ice Maker Freezer Bags | 700 Ice Cubes, 28 Ice Per Bag | Plastic Liquid Freezer Bags | Disposable Ice Packs for Party, Whiskey, Juice, Drinks, Cocktail, Coffee, BBQ Party, Garden
features: 🧊🍹🎉 25 Pack of Ice Cube Bags: Each pack makes 700 ice cubes (28 per bag) — perfect for BBQs, garden parties, and catering events where ice is always in demand.
💦🥶🧃 Easy to Fill & Freeze: Simply fill with water and freeze — no spills, no leaks, no mess, just perfectly shaped ice cubes every time.
🥂🧊☕ Ideal for Drinks & Chilling: Great for cocktails, whiskey, juice, smoothies, iced coffee, and soft drinks, keeping your beverages refreshing and cool.
🧼❄️🏠 Hygienic & Disposable: Single-use, food-grade plastic ensures hygienic ice making without cross-contamination or reusable tray cleaning.
🧳🍸🍺 Compact & Space-Saving: Lightweight and foldable design saves freezer space — great for travel, picnics, and outdoor parties.
description: Keep your drinks chilled and party-ready with this 25 Pack of Ice Cube Bags, designed for effortless ice making and storage. Each bag creates 28 individual cubes, giving you a total of 700 ice cubes per pack — ideal for BBQs, garden parties, camping, and events. These plastic freezer-safe bags make ice preparation clean, easy, and mess-free. Perfect for whiskey, cocktails, juices, iced coffee, and smoothies, the leak-proof design ensures no spills while freezing. Simply fill, seal, and freeze — then remove individual cubes as needed. A practical and space-saving alternative to bulky ice trays, these disposable ice cube bags are great for both home and commercial kitchens.
